ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is closed for Core services.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
NOT( OR(RecordType.Name = "Optum Sales Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "Consulting Services Sales", RecordType.Name = "Primary Care Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "Patient Engagement Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "SNF - Skilled Nursing Facility", RecordType.Name = "AL - Assisted Living Facility", RecordType.Name = "eMAC Sales Opportunity")) &&
(ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed - SCP Declined")|| ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed - Client Abandoned Proposal")|| ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed - No Change"))&&
(ISNULL(CloseDate)|| ISPICKVAL(Close_Reason__c, "")|| ISNULL(Lost_Date__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: Lost Date, Close Date and Close Reason.
